name: E-8 standardized rule metadata: replaced_by must be an array of rule-id strings; scalar values are rejected
command:
printf 'id: g-ts-306
type: problem
replaced_by: g-ts-999
' > g-ts-306.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-306.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'replaced_by: must be array of rule-id strings' err.txt && echo array_enforced 1>&2
